ddls:
CREATE TABLE "audio_codecs" (
  "codec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each codec */,
  "codec_name" TEXT /* Name of the audio codec */,
  "codec_type" TEXT /* Type of the audio codec (e.g., lossy, lossless) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the audio codec */,
  "compression_ratio" REAL /* Compression ratio of the codec */,
  "latency" REAL /* Latency of the codec in milliseconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("codec_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bitrate_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bitrate setting */,
  "codec_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the codec */,
  "quality_level" INTEGER /* Quality level (e.g., 0 for low, 4 for high) */,
  "narrowband_bitrate" INTEGER /* Bitrate for narrowband audio */,
  "wideband_bitrate" INTEGER /* Bitrate for wideband audio */,
  "ultra_wideband_bitrate" INTEGER /* Bitrate for ultra-wideband audio */,
  "celt_bitrate" INTEGER /* Bitrate for CELT codec */,
  "opus_voice_bitrate" INTEGER /* Bitrate for Opus voice codec */,
  "opus_music_bitrate" INTEGER /* Bitrate for Opus music codec */,
  "min_network_speed" INTEGER /* Minimum network speed required for this setting in Mbps */,
  "max_network_speed" INTEGER /* Maximum network speed supported by this setting in Mbps */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bitrate_settings_codec_id FOREIGN KEY ("codec_id") REFERENCES audio_codecs ("codec_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "streaming_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each streaming session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user streaming the content */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device used for streaming */,
  "network_speed" INTEGER /* Estimated network speed in Mbps */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the streaming session started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the streaming session ended */,
  "average_bitrate" REAL /* Average bitrate achieved during the session */,
  "total_bytes_transferred" INTEGER /* Total bytes transferred during the session */,
  "average_latency" REAL /* Average latency experienced during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_streaming_sessions_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_streaming_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., smartphone, tablet, PC) */,
  "supported_codecs" TEXT /* List of audio codecs supported by the device */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system of the device */,
  "hardware_capabilities" TEXT /* Hardware capabilities of the device (e.g., CPU, RAM, GPU) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "preferred_quality" INTEGER /* Preferred quality level (e.g., 0 for low, 4 for high) */,
  "listening_history" TEXT /* List of previously listened content */,
  "recommended_quality" INTEGER /* Recommended quality level based on user's listening history */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content */,
  "content_name" TEXT /* Name of the content */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of the content (e.g., song, podcast, audiobook) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the content */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the content in seconds */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_content_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content */,
  "preferred_quality" INTEGER /* Preferred quality level for the content */,
  "playback_speed" REAL /* Playback speed for the content (e.g., 1.0 for normal speed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_content_preferences_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_content_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "streaming_session_content" (
  "session_content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session content */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the streaming session */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the content started playing */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the content stopped playing */,
  "bytes_transferred" INTEGER /* Bytes transferred during the content playback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_streaming_session_content_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES streaming_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_streaming_session_content_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content */,
  "artist" TEXT /* Artist of the content */,
  "album" TEXT /* Album of the content */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Release year of the content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_metadata_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)
